items.definition_en: Bamboo is a tall grass with hard, hollow stems.
items.example_en: Bamboo grows quickly in warm gardens.

items.definition_en: A dandelion is a common yellow flower that grows in grass.
items.example_en: Children like to blow the seeds of a dandelion.

items.definition_en: A marigold is a bright orange or yellow garden flower.
items.example_en: Marigolds add color to the garden borders.

items.definition_en: A poppy is a plant with bright red flowers.
items.example_en: Red poppies bloom every summer.

items.definition_en: A tulip is a spring flower with a cup-shaped bloom.
items.example_en: Many people plant tulips in the spring.

items.definition_en: A hydrangea is a bush with large round clusters of flowers.
items.example_en: The hydrangea in the garden turns pink in summer.

items.definition_en: A daisy chain is a string of flowers made by joining stems.
items.example_en: She wore a daisy chain on her head.

items.definition_en: A peony is a large garden flower with many petals.
items.example_en: Peonies bloom in late spring.

items.definition_en: An orchid is a delicate flower often grown indoors.
items.example_en: Orchids can have very striking colors.

items.definition_en: A camellia is a bush with shiny leaves and pretty flowers.
items.example_en: The pink camellia blooms early in the year.

items.definition_en: A bluebell is a wild plant with small blue flowers.
items.example_en: Bluebells cover the garden in spring.

items.definition_en: A magnolia is a tree or bush with large white or pink flowers.
items.example_en: Magnolias bloom early in the spring.

items.definition_en: A pansy is a small plant with colorful flowers.
items.example_en: Pansies are perfect for window boxes.

items.definition_en: A petunia is a garden plant with many bright flowers.
items.example_en: Petunias look lovely in garden pots.

items.definition_en: A primrose is an early blooming garden flower.
items.example_en: Primroses are one of the first flowers in spring.

items.definition_en: A snapdragon is a tall plant with brightly colored flowers.
items.example_en: Snapdragons grow well in sunny places.

items.definition_en: A violet is a small garden flower, often purple.
items.example_en: He picked a violet in the garden.

items.definition_en: A foxglove is a tall plant with bell-shaped flowers.
items.example_en: Foxgloves attract bees and butterflies.

items.definition_en: An iris is a tall plant with blue or purple flowers.
items.example_en: Irises bloom at the edge of the garden pond.

items.definition_en: A hosta is a leafy plant often grown for its greenery.
items.example_en: Hostas do well in shady garden corners.
